---
title: "BLAST barcodes"
author: "Srishti Arya"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    df_print: paged
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
---

#setup

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidytext)
library(forcats)
library(Biostrings)
library(taxonomizr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggalluvial)
library(paletteer)
library(patchwork)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
options(scipen = 999)

# colour palettes for all further analyses
chosen_level_colours <- c(
  "Acari"           = "#E6A817",
  # warm amber
  "Annelida"        = "#7B2D8B",
  # deep purple
  "Copepoda"        = "#2DB34A",
  # vivid green
  "Insecta"         = "#D4E84A",
  # yellow-green
  "Nematoda"        = "#E8334A",
  # strong red
  "Platyhelminthes" = "#3A7A5C",
  # teal-green
  "Rotifera"        = "#FF6EC7",
  # hot pink
  "Tardigrada"      = "#4A90D9",
  # clear sky blue
  "Gastrotricha"    = "#00C9A7",
  # bright teal
  "Ciliophora"      = "#FFEC8B",
  # light goldenrod
  "Cladocera"       = "#FF8C00",
  # dark orange
  "Ostracoda"       = "#8B1A1A",
  # deep brick red
  "Mollusca"        = "#5B4FCF",
  # indigo
  "NA"              = "#D6D6D6",
  # light grey
  "off-target"      = "#D6D6D6",
  # light greyl
  "Other"      = "#D6D6D6",
  # light grey
  "Other Protista"  = "#C4956A"   # warm tan
)


barcode_colours <- c("maroon4",
                     "steelblue4",
                     "lightskyblue",
                     "olivedrab1",
                     "darkolivegreen")
```

# loading in data
```{r load data}
# these are the large-scale BLAST results for all contigs: outfmt 6, with 5 sseqids per sequence (qseqid)
all_BLAST_barcodes <- read_tsv("../../../all_BLAST_top5.tsv", col_names = F) %>%
  dplyr::select("X1", "X2", "X3", "X7") %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    qseqid = X1,
    qseqs_length = X2,
    sseqid = X3,
    taxid = X7
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    #some regexing to get separated out information
    qseqid = gsub("BWplate", "Garden", qseqid),
    qseqid = gsub("day", "Lakes", qseqid),
    dataset = str_extract(qseqid, "Lakes[0-9]|Garden[0-9]"),
    gb_num = str_extract(sseqid, "(?<=(gb|emb)\\|)[^|]+"),
    # needed for taxID info
    sseqid = stringr::str_extract(sseqid, "(?<=gi\\|)[^|]+"),
    readcount = gsub("readcount_", "", (str_extract(
      qseqid, "readcount_[0-9]+"
    ))),
    readcount = as.numeric(readcount),
    sample = paste0(
      stringr::str_extract(qseqid, "SP27_[0-9]+_SP5_[0-9]+"),
      "_",
      dataset
    ),
    # the adapters are repeated per dataset so pasting them together keeps things individual
    barcode = case_when(
      # what barcode is this?
      grepl("28S", qseqid) ~ "28S",
      grepl("18S", qseqid) ~ "18S",
      TRUE ~ "COI"
    ),
    primer_set = case_when(
      # which primers were used?
      barcode == "COI" & qseqs_length <= 499 ~ "Sauron",
      barcode == "COI" & qseqs_length >= 500 ~ "Moorea",
      barcode == "28S" & qseqs_length <= 2499 ~ "18S+",
      barcode == "28S" &
        qseqs_length >= 2500 ~ "28S_solo",
      barcode == "18S" ~ "18S+",
      TRUE ~ "?"
    )
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    read.csv("../../../DK_amplicon_blasting/all_DK_BW_blast_final.csv") %>%
      dplyr::rename(dataset = plate, name = new_code) %>%
      mutate(
        dataset = gsub("BW_", "Garden", dataset),
        dataset = gsub("day_", "Lakes", dataset),
        dataset = gsub("Lakes_", "Lakes", dataset),
        dataset = gsub("Garden_", "Garden", dataset),
        sample = paste0(sample, "_", dataset),
        barcode = if_else(barcode == "CO1", "COI", barcode),
        name = gsub("cf. ", "", name)
      ) %>%
      distinct(sample, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
      select(sample, name, expected_taxon),
    by = c("sample")
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    getTaxonomy(.$taxid, # adding taxonomy rankings for all hits based on the taxid
                '../../../accessionTaxa.sql', version = "base") %>%
      as.data.frame() %>%
      rownames_to_column(var = "taxid") %>%
      mutate(taxid = str_extract(taxid, "\\d+")),
    by = "taxid",
    multiple = "first"
  ) %>%
  mutate(readcount = as.integer(readcount))
```

# get lca from taxonomy
```{r calc lca}
# Calculate LCA and top hit per hit
tax_cols_present <- c("domain",
                      "phylum",
                      "class",
                      "order",
                      "family",
                      "genus",
                      "species")

all_BLAST_barcodes_taxonomy_lca <- all_BLAST_barcodes %>%
  group_by(qseqid) %>%
  mutate(lca = {
    agreed <- sapply(tax_cols_present, 
                     function(col) {
      vals <- unique(na.omit(get(col)))
      if (length(vals) == 1)
        vals
      else
        NA_character_
    })
    lca <- tail(agreed[!is.na(agreed)], 1)
    if (length(lca) == 0)
      NA_character_
    else
      as.character(lca)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(matching_rank = {
    tax_values <- c(domain, 
                    phylum, 
                    class, 
                    order, 
                    family, 
                    genus, 
                    species)
    rank_names <- c("domain",
                    "phylum",
                    "class",
                    "order",
                    "family",
                    "genus",
                    "species")
    match_idx <- which(!is.na(tax_values) & 
                         tax_values == lca)
    if (length(match_idx) > 0)
      rank_names[match_idx[1]]
    else
      NA_character_
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    phylum_grouped = ifelse(phylum %in% expected_taxon, 
                            phylum, 
                            "off-target"),
    name_taxon = paste(expected_taxon, 
                       name, 
                       sep = "_"),
    name_taxon = factor(name_taxon, 
                        levels = unique(name_taxon)),
    chosen_level = case_when(phylum == "Arthropoda" ~ expected_taxon, 
                             TRUE ~ phylum_grouped),
    chosen_level = replace_na(chosen_level, "NA"),
    primer_barcode = paste(barcode, ",", primer_set),
    dataset = gsub("BWplate", "Garden", dataset),
    dataset = gsub("day", "Lakes", dataset),
    sample = paste0(sample, "_", dataset)
  ) %>%
  arrange(expected_taxon, name)
```

```{r readcounts for all contigs violins, fig.height=3, fig.width=3}
# readcount violins
sum_contigs <-
  all_BLAST_barcodes_taxonomy_lca %>% group_by(primer_barcode) %>% summarize(total =
                                                                               n())
readcounts_violins <- all_BLAST_barcodes_taxonomy_lca %>%
  distinct(qseqid, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(qseqid = fct_reorder(qseqid, readcount)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = primer_barcode, y = readcount, fill = primer_barcode)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.2,
               color = "black",
               alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_y_log10(
    breaks = c(1, 10, 100, 1000, 10000),
    labels = c("1", "10", "100", "1,000", "10,000")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = barcode_colours,
    name = ""
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 8) +
  geom_text(data = sum_contigs, aes(
    label = total,
    y = 11000,
    hjust = 0.5,
    vjust = 0
  )) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm"),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 2)) +
  labs(y = "log10 scaled Read Counts", x = "Barcode & Primer")

readcounts_violins

# ggsave(
#   filename = "plots/readcount_violins_log10.pdf",
#   plot = readcounts_violins,
#   width = 3,
#   height = 3
# )
```

# lollipops
```{r lollipop, fig.height=7, fig.width=12}
create_lollipop_plot <- function(data,
                                 y_var,
                                 facet_vars     = NULL,
                                 filter_group   = FALSE,
                                 group_label    = "non-metazoan/non-ciliate",
                                 barcode       = NULL,
                                 use_colour_map = FALSE,
                                 colour_map     = chosen_level_colours,
                                 biological_rank_order = FALSE) {
  y_var <- rlang::ensym(y_var)
  if (!is.null(barcode))
    data <- data %>% filter(barcode == !!barcode)
  if (filter_group)
    data <- data %>% filter(lca_grouped != group_label)
  group_vars <- if (!is.null(facet_vars)) {
    c(rlang::as_label(y_var), facet_vars)
  } else {
    c(rlang::as_label(y_var), "barcode")
  }
  plot_data <- data %>%
    mutate(!!y_var := forcats::fct_explicit_na(!!y_var, "NA"))
  if (biological_rank_order) {
    biological_order <- c("domain",
                          "phylum",
                          "class",
                          "order",
                          "family",
                          "genus",
                          "species",
                          "NA")
    plot_data <- plot_data %>%
      mutate(!!y_var := factor(!!y_var, levels = biological_order))
  }
  plot_data <- plot_data %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(group_vars))) %>%
    summarise(n = n_distinct(qseqid), 
              .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(setdiff(
      group_vars, 
      rlang::as_label(y_var)
    )))) %>%
    mutate(percentage = n / sum(n) * 100) %>%
    ungroup()
  facet_formula <- if (!is.null(facet_vars)) {
    vars(!!!lapply(facet_vars, rlang::sym))
  } else {
    vars(barcode)
  }
  colour_scale <- if (use_colour_map) {
    scale_color_manual(values = colour_map)
  } else {
    scale_color_viridis_d()
  }
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = !!y_var, 
                        y = percentage)) +
    geom_segment(
      aes(
        xend = !!y_var,
        y = 0,
        yend = percentage
      ),
      color = "grey70",
      linewidth = 1.5
    ) +
    geom_point(aes(color = !!y_var), 
               size = 2) +
    geom_text(aes(label = n),
              vjust = -0.9,
              hjust = 0.05,
              size = 2) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      labels = scales::label_percent(scale = 1, 
                                     accuracy = 1),
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))
    ) +
    colour_scale +
    coord_flip() +
    facet_wrap(facet_formula, nrow = 1) +
    labs(x = rlang::as_label(y_var), 
         y = "Percentage") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 8) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, 
                                 hjust = 0.9),
      strip.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
      panel.spacing = unit(0.25, "lines")
    )
}

plot_matching_ranks_lollipop <-
  create_lollipop_plot(
    all_BLAST_barcodes_taxonomy_lca,
    matching_rank,
    facet_vars = c("primer_set", "barcode"),
    biological_rank_order = TRUE
  ) +
  labs(x = "Matching taxonomy rank")

ggsave(
  filename = "plots/plot_matching_ranks_lollipop.pdf",
  plot = plot_matching_ranks_lollipop,
  width = 4.5,
  height = 3
)

plot_phyla_clean_lollipop <- create_lollipop_plot(
  all_BLAST_barcodes_taxonomy_lca,
  chosen_level,
  facet_vars = c("primer_set", "barcode")
) +
  labs(x = "")

ggsave(
  filename = "plots/plot_phyla_clean_lollipop.pdf",
  plot = plot_phyla_clean_lollipop,
  width = 7,
  height = 4
)
```

## proportions of correctly LCA-BLAST-ing contigs per chosen taxon
```{r phyla proportion plot grouped functions, fig.width=5, fig.height=7}
make_proportion_data <- function(data, taxa_filter, category_expr) {
  data %>%
    filter(expected_taxon %in% taxa_filter) %>%
    mutate(phylum_category = {{ category_expr }}) %>%
    group_by(expected_taxon, primer_set, phylum_category, barcode) %>%
    summarise(n = n_distinct(qseqid), .groups = "drop") %>%
    complete(nesting(expected_taxon, primer_set, barcode),
             phylum_category,
             fill = list(n = 0)) %>%
    group_by(expected_taxon, primer_set, barcode) %>%
    mutate(proportion = n / sum(n)) %>%
    ungroup()
}

create_phylum_proportion_plot_grouped <- function(data, level_order, colours = chosen_level_colours) {
  data %>%
    mutate(
      stack_order = case_when(
        as.character(phylum_category) == as.character(expected_taxon) ~ 3,
        as.character(phylum_category) == "Other" ~ 1,
        TRUE ~ 2
      ),
      phylum_category = factor(phylum_category, levels = c("Other", level_order))
    ) %>%
    arrange(primer_set, barcode, expected_taxon, desc(stack_order)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(
      x = expected_taxon,
      y = proportion,
      fill = phylum_category,
      group = interaction(expected_taxon, stack_order)
    )) +
    geom_col(position = position_stack(), width = 0.7) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = colours) +
    labs(x = "Taxon sampled", y = "Proportion of hits", fill = "Phylum") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 7) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      legend.position = c(0.85, 0.2),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 5),
      legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm"),
      strip.text.x = element_text(size = 5)
    ) +
    guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 2)) +
    facet_wrap(vars(primer_set, barcode), scales = "free_x")
}

target_taxa_for_grouped_stack <- c(
  "Annelida",
  "Ciliophora",
  "Gastrotricha",
  "Nematoda",
  "Platyhelminthes",
  "Rotifera",
  "Tardigrada",
  "Acari",
  "Cladocera",
  "Copepoda",
  "Ostracoda"
)

plot_chosen_stacked_proportions <- all_BLAST_barcodes_taxonomy_lca %>%
  make_proportion_data(
    taxa_filter   = target_taxa_for_grouped_stack,
    category_expr = if_else(
      !is.na(chosen_level) &
        chosen_level %in% target_taxa_for_grouped_stack,
      chosen_level,
      "Other"
    )
  ) %>%
  create_phylum_proportion_plot_grouped(level_order = target_taxa_for_grouped_stack)


# ggsave(
#   filename = "plots/plot_chosen_stacked_proportions.pdf",
#   plot = plot_chosen_stacked_proportions,
#   width = 8,
#   height = 5
# )
```

# supplementary figures and tables

## read and contig counts across processing
```{r data processing for plot}
palette <- c("#2d6a4f", "#40916c", "#74c69d",  # forest greens
             "#023e8a", "#0077b6", "#48cae4")  # ocean blues

stats_list <- list.files(path = "../../../stats/", pattern = "*tsv$", full.names = TRUE)
stats_files <- lapply(stats_list, read_tsv)

parse_stats_function <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    # split the single column on 2+ spaces
    separate(1, 
             into = c("file", "format", "type", "num_seqs", "sum_len",
                      "min_len", "avg_len", "max_len"),
             sep = "\\s{2,}",
             extra = "drop") %>%
    mutate(
      num_seqs = as.numeric(str_remove_all(num_seqs, ",")),
      # extract dataset from the start of the file path
      dataset  = str_extract(file, "^[^/]+")
    )
}

parsed_stats_list <- lapply(stats_files, parse_stats_function)

parsed_stats_list_renamed <- list(
  COI_cleaned = parsed_stats_list[[1]],
  COI_contigs = parsed_stats_list[[2]],
  Demultiplexed     = parsed_stats_list[[3]],
  Pychopper_cleaned   = parsed_stats_list[[4]],
  rRNA_18S    = parsed_stats_list[[5]] %>% mutate(dataset = str_extract(file, "BW_plate[0-9]+|Lakes_day[0-9]+")),
  rRNA_28S    = parsed_stats_list[[6]] %>% mutate(dataset = str_extract(file, "BW_plate[0-9]+|Lakes_day[0-9]+")),
  rRNA_contigs= parsed_stats_list[[7]]
)

summarise_stage_function <- function(df, stage_name) {
  df %>%
    group_by(dataset) %>%
    summarise(count = sum(num_seqs, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(stage = stage_name)
}

parsed_stats_summarised_list <- list(
  s_Pychopper_cleaned = summarise_stage_function(parsed_stats_list_renamed$Pychopper_cleaned, "Pychopper cleaned"),
  s_Demultiplexed   = summarise_stage_function(parsed_stats_list_renamed$Demultiplexed, "Demultiplexed"),

  s_COI_contigs  = summarise_stage_function(parsed_stats_list_renamed$COI_contigs, "AmpliconSorted COI"),
  s_rRNA_contigs = summarise_stage_function(parsed_stats_list_renamed$rRNA_contigs, "AmpliconSorted rRNA"),

  s_18S = summarise_stage_function(parsed_stats_list_renamed$rRNA_18S, "18S"),
  s_28S = summarise_stage_function(parsed_stats_list_renamed$rRNA_28S, "28S"),
  s_COI_cleaned   = summarise_stage_function(parsed_stats_list_renamed$COI_cleaned, "COI")
)

stage_levels <- c("Pychopper cleaned", "Demultiplexed", "AmpliconSorted COI", 
                  "AmpliconSorted rRNA", "18S", "28S", "COI")
```

```{r alluvial plot, fig.height=5, fig.width=8}
alluvial_df <- bind_rows(
  parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_Pychopper_cleaned, 
  parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_Demultiplexed, 
  parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_rRNA, 
  parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_COI_contigs, 
  parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_18S, 
  parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_28S, 
  parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_COI_cleaned
) %>%
  mutate(stage = factor(stage, levels = stage_levels))

# Panel 1: Pychopper_cleaned → Demultiplexed → AmpliconSorted COI / rRNA
stage_levels_p1 <- c("Pychopper cleaned", "Demultiplexed", "AmpliconSorted COI", "AmpliconSorted rRNA")

df_p1 <- bind_rows(parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_Pychopper_cleaned, 
                   parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_Demultiplexed) %>%
  mutate(stage = factor(stage, levels = stage_levels_p1))

p1 <- ggplot(df_p1,
       aes(x = stage, y = count,
           alluvium = dataset, stratum = dataset,
           fill = dataset)) +
  geom_flow(stat = "alluvium", aes.flow = "forward", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_stratum(alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette) +
  labs(title = "Pychopper Cleaned → Demultiplexed", x = NULL, y = "Count", fill = "Dataset") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 8) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "none")

# Panel 2: AmpliconSorted rRNA → 18S / 28S
stage_levels_p2 <- c("AmpliconSorted rRNA", "rRNA product")

# For each dataset, rRNA splits into 18S AND 28S
stage_levels_p2a <- c("AmpliconSorted rRNA", "18S")

df_p2a <- bind_rows(parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_rRNA_contigs, 
                   parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_18S) %>%
  mutate(stage = factor(stage, levels = stage_levels_p2a))

p2a <- ggplot(df_p2a,
       aes(x = stage, y = count,
           alluvium = dataset, stratum = dataset,
           fill = dataset)) +
  geom_flow(stat = "alluvium", aes.flow = "forward", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_stratum(alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette) +
  labs(title = "rRNA AS → 18S Barrnap", x = NULL, y = "Count", fill = "Dataset") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 8) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

stage_levels_p2b <- c("AmpliconSorted rRNA", "28S")

df_p2b <- bind_rows(parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_rRNA_contigs, 
                   parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_28S) %>%
  mutate(stage = factor(stage, levels = stage_levels_p2b))

p2b <- ggplot(df_p2b,
       aes(x = stage, y = count,
           alluvium = dataset, stratum = dataset,
           fill = dataset)) +
  geom_flow(stat = "alluvium", aes.flow = "forward", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_stratum(alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette) +
  labs(title = "rRNA AS → 28S Barrnap", x = NULL, y = "Count", fill = "Dataset") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 8) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

# Panel 3: AmpliconSorted COI → COI final
stage_levels_p3 <- c("AmpliconSorted COI", "COI")

df_p3 <- bind_rows(parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_COI_contigs, 
                   parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_COI_cleaned) %>%
  mutate(stage = factor(stage, levels = stage_levels_p3))

p3 <- ggplot(df_p3,
       aes(x = stage, y = count,
           alluvium = dataset, stratum = dataset,
           fill = dataset)) +
  geom_flow(stat = "alluvium", aes.flow = "forward", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_stratum(alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette) +
  labs(title = "COI AS → COI cleaned", x = NULL, y = "Count", fill = "Dataset") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 8) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

alluvial_processing_plot<-
  p1 / (p2a + p2b + p3) +
  plot_annotation(
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 8))
  ) +
  plot_layout(guides = 'collect')

alluvial_processing_plot

# ggsave(
#   filename = "plots/alluvial_processing_plot.pdf",
#   plot = alluvial_processing_plot,
#   width = 8,
#   height = 5
# )
```

## average readcounts for barcodes
```{r barcode readcounts csv}
all_BLAST_barcodes_taxonomy_lca %>% 
  distinct(qseqid, .keep_all = TRUE) %>% 
  group_by(primer_barcode) %>% 
  summarise(
    Min       = min(readcount),
    Q1        = quantile(readcount, 0.25),
    Median    = median(readcount),
    Mean      = mean(readcount),
    Q3        = quantile(readcount, 0.75),
    Max       = max(readcount),
    .groups   = "drop"
  ) %>% 
  dplyr::rename("Barcode and Primer" = "primer_barcode") %>% 
  write.csv("plots/mean_readcounts_per_barcode.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

## number of contigs per primer_set~barcode
```{r contigs, fig.width = 3.5, fig.height = 3}
primer_set_dataset_hits <-
  all_BLAST_barcodes_taxonomy_lca %>%
  distinct(qseqid, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  group_by(dataset, primer_barcode) %>%
  summarise(retrieved_hits = n()) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = retrieved_hits, x = dataset, fill = primer_barcode)) +
  geom_bar(position = "dodge",
           stat = "identity",
           width = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = barcode_colours, name = "Primer/Barcode") +
  labs(x = "", y = "Contig count") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 8) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm")
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 2))

primer_set_dataset_hits

# ggsave(
#   filename = "plots/primer_set_dataset_hits.pdf",
#   plot = primer_set_dataset_hits,
#   width = 3.5,
#   height = 3
# )
```

## more lollipop plots
```{r}
plot_phyla_lollipop <-
  create_lollipop_plot(
    all_BLAST_barcodes_taxonomy_lca,
    phylum,
    facet_vars = c("primer_set", "barcode")
  )

ggsave(filename = "plots/plot_phyla_lollipop.pdf", 
       plot = plot_phyla_lollipop, 
       width = 10, height = 10)


plot_lca_lollipop <- create_lollipop_plot(all_BLAST_barcodes_taxonomy_lca,
                                          lca,
                                          facet_vars = c("primer_set", "barcode"))

# ggsave(filename = "plots/plot_lca_lollipop.pdf", 
#        plot = plot_lca_lollipop, 
#        width = 15, height = 55,
#        limitsize = FALSE)
```

## co-occurrence bubble plots
```{r bubbles, fig.width=25, fig.height=20}
create_bubble_plot <- function(data,
                               x_var,
                               y_var,
                               title        = NULL,
                               x_label      = NULL,
                               y_label      = NULL,
                               barcode     = NULL,
                               group_label  = "off-target",
                               size_range   = c(0.2, 3),
                               facet_rows   = NULL,
                               facet_cols   = NULL,
                               facet_scales = "free_x",
                               facet_space  = "free_x",
                               angle_x      = 45,
                               colour_map   = chosen_level_colours) {
  x_var <- rlang::ensym(x_var)
  y_var <- rlang::ensym(y_var)
  
  if (!is.null(barcode))
    data <- data %>% filter(barcode == !!barcode)
  
  p <- ggplot(data,
              aes(
                x = !!x_var,
                y = !!y_var,
                size = readcount,
                color = chosen_level
              )) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    scale_size_continuous(range = size_range, name = "Read Count") +
    scale_color_manual(values = colour_map) +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x     = if (!is.null(x_label))
        x_label
      else
        rlang::as_label(x_var),
      y     = if (!is.null(y_label))
        y_label
      else
        rlang::as_label(y_var),
      color = "Phylum"
    ) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 8) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
      strip.text.x = element_text(angle = 270, size = 12),
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 270, size = 12)
    )
  
  if (!is.null(facet_rows) && !is.null(facet_cols)) {
    row_syms <- lapply(facet_rows, rlang::sym)
    col_syms <- lapply(facet_cols, rlang::sym)
    p <- p + facet_grid(
      rows = vars(!!!row_syms),
      cols = vars(!!!col_syms),
      scales = facet_scales,
      space = facet_space
    )
  } else if (!is.null(facet_rows)) {
    row_syms <- lapply(facet_rows, rlang::sym)
    p <- p + facet_wrap(vars(!!!row_syms), scales = facet_scales)
  } else if (!is.null(facet_cols)) {
    col_syms <- lapply(facet_cols, rlang::sym)
    p <- p + facet_wrap(vars(!!!col_syms), scales = facet_scales)
  }
  
  return(p)
}

#compound plot
main_bubble_plot <- create_bubble_plot(
  data      = all_BLAST_barcodes_taxonomy_lca,
  x_var     = name_taxon,
  y_var     = chosen_level,
  x_label = "Sample",
  y_label = "Phylum",
  title     = NULL,
  facet_rows  = c("primer_set", "barcode"),
  facet_cols  = c("expected_taxon"),
  angle_x   = 45
)

main_bubble_plot

ggsave(
  filename = "plots/main_bubble_plot.pdf",
  plot = main_bubble_plot,
  width = 20,
  height = 12,
  limitsize = FALSE
)

# 28S barcode
plot_sample_bubbles_28S <- create_bubble_plot(
  all_BLAST_barcodes_taxonomy_lca,
  x_var      = name,
  y_var      = chosen_level,
  x_label = "Sample",
  y_label = "Phylum",
  title      = "Sample Composition - Metazoa Only (28S)",
  barcode   = "28S",
  facet_rows  = c("primer_set", "barcode"),
  facet_cols  = c("expected_taxon")
)
plot_sample_bubbles_28S

# 18S barcode
plot_sample_bubbles_18S <- create_bubble_plot(
  all_BLAST_barcodes_taxonomy_lca,
  x_var    = name,
  y_var    = chosen_level,
  x_label = "Sample",
  y_label = "Phylum",
  title    = "Sample Composition - Metazoa Only (18S)",
  barcode = "18S",
  facet_rows  = c("primer_set", "barcode"),
  facet_cols  = c("expected_taxon")
)
plot_sample_bubbles_18S

# COI barcode
plot_sample_bubbles_COI <- create_bubble_plot(
  all_BLAST_barcodes_taxonomy_lca,
  x_var    = name,
  y_var    = chosen_level,
  x_label = "Sample",
  y_label = "Phylum",
  title    = "Sample Composition - Metazoa Only (COI)",
  barcode = "COI",
  facet_rows  = c("primer_set", "barcode"),
  facet_cols  = c("expected_taxon")
)
plot_sample_bubbles_COI
```

```{r versioning}
sessionInfo()
```
